sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59097" key="kore/w2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κορέω</orth> (B), <sense id="n59097.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κορέννυμι</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κορζία</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">καρδία</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
